site.title: Dinh Hop
site.description: Dinh Hop is a frontend developer based in Vietnam with 4 years of experience building responsive web and mobile products with Next.js, React.js, React Native, Node.js, Shopify, WordPress, and AWS services.

footer.creditText: Frontend Developer focused on React, Next.js, React Native, Shopify, and Node.js.

hero.headline: Dinh Hop.
hero.subheadline: I build frontend products for web and mobile.
hero.description: I'm a frontend developer with 4 years of experience building responsive products with Next.js, React.js, React Native, Node.js, Shopify, WordPress, and AWS-backed services. I focus on clean UI, reliable delivery, and scalable product experiences.

paragraphs: I'm Dinh Hop, a frontend developer based in Vietnam who enjoys building products that feel fast, clear, and easy to use. Over the last 4 years, I've focused on modern frontend delivery across product websites, e-commerce, content platforms, and cross-platform apps.

My work spans Next.js and React applications, React Native mobile experiences, Shopify storefronts, WordPress builds, and Node.js integrations. I've also worked with AWS services to support deployment workflows, third-party integrations, and production-ready web platforms.

I care about responsive UI, maintainable code, and shipping dependable products with designers, PMs, and engineers. A lot of my recent work has been in e-commerce, content hubs, NFT/community platforms, and internal product tools.
about.skillsIntro: Here are a few technologies I've been working with recently:

contact.title: Let's build something solid
contact.description: I'm open to frontend opportunities, Shopify and WordPress work, React Native builds, and product teams that need a reliable engineer to ship clean UI and maintainable code. If you have a project in mind, send me a message.
